achievements.title: Built Production RAG Chatbot
achievements.description: Designed and deployed a complete PDF-RAG-Chatbot using LangChain, Mistral AI, FAISS, and Streamlit. The system enables intelligent Q&A over any PDF document with persistent chat history stored in SQLite.
achievements.impact: Demonstrates end-to-end AI/RAG engineering from document ingestion to LLM response generation

achievements.title: Full-Stack Streamlit Application
achievements.description: Built a complete Job Application Tracker with user authentication, CRUD operations, analytics dashboards, and CSV export. Clean code architecture with Streamlit + SQLite.
achievements.impact: Demonstrates full-stack Python development with real authentication and data persistence

achievements.title: DevOps Infrastructure Automation
achievements.description: Designed end-to-end CI/CD pipeline architecture using GitHub Actions, Docker, Kubernetes, and Terraform for AWS cloud deployment. Complete GitOps workflow with Prometheus/Grafana monitoring.
achievements.impact: Demonstrates professional DevOps engineering with real infrastructure-as-code patterns

achievements.title: Multi-Domain Technical Expertise
achievements.description: Self-taught expertise spanning DevOps (Docker, K8s, Terraform), Cloud (AWS, GCP), AI/ML (LangChain, PyTorch, RAG), and Backend (Python, C++, Django, FastAPI) — all demonstrated through working projects.
achievements.impact: Rare combination of DevOps automation + AI engineering skills in one engineer

achievements.title: Open Source Portfolio
achievements.description: Maintains an active GitHub profile with real, working projects covering AI/RAG, web applications, and DevOps automation. All projects include documentation and clean code.
achievements.impact: Transparent, verifiable skill demonstration through public code

summary: Suryanandan's key achievements include building a production RAG chatbot, a full-stack Streamlit application, and designing enterprise-grade DevOps CI/CD pipelines. He has developed rare cross-domain expertise in DevOps automation and AI engineering simultaneously.
